data.title: Firefly Neuroscience And Bright Minds Advance Phase 1 Study With AI-Driven Data Analysis
data.description: Firefly Neuroscience partners with Bright Minds Biosciences to analyze positive Phase 1 data of BMB-101 using advanced AI technology, setting the stage for Phase 2 trials.

data.title: 'They're Still In Prison For Cannabis' Says 420-420 CEO: How One Text Campaign Seeks Justice
data.description: Maurer managed to secure approval for his SMS shortcode, 420420, from all major carriers: Verizon, T-Mobile, and AT&T.
